title: Sprint stanza
description: Compact 4-field machine-validated header for docs/sprint_objective.md. Carried into v4 from csagent practice. Validated at sub-sprint dispatch (orchestrator preflight: validate_stanza gate, process/delivery-loop.md §4.2.4) and at close.

scope_in.description: Specific deliverables this sub-sprint produces. Must be subset of charter.approved_scope (scope_envelope_check, process/delivery-loop.md §4.2.5).

layers.description: Fix-layers this sub-sprint touches. Must be subset of charter.approved_scope.layers_allowed.

exit_criteria.description: Observable criteria for sub-sprint close. Distinct from milestone closure_contract — this is sub-sprint-level.

modules.description: Optional repo paths (if not enumerated, derived from charter.approved_scope.modules_in_scope ∩ scope_in).

covered_req_ids.description: Δ-19 / Constitution §1.7-F clause 1. ONLY on a gap-followup remediation sub-sprint: the in-envelope requirement ids this sub-sprint closes. The Phase 2-γ runtime req_id-envelope check proves covered_req_ids ⊆ (F1 signed snapshot ∩ the milestone's signed covers_req_ids) — DISTINCT from the module/layer scope-expansion guard. OPTIONAL + additive: absent on normal sub-sprints; every existing stanza still validates.

task_signals.description: Track 1 §2.3 — SIGNED task-affinity signals for task-aware dynamic skill mounting (e.g. [ui, frontend]); the sub-sprint-doc PROJECTION of the same field. The AUTHORITATIVE Deliver-authored source the RUNTIME consumes is deliver-plan-verdict.schema.json sub_sprints[].task_signals (→ self.state.planned_subsprints → driver _current_subsprint_plan()); this stanza field mirrors it for the docs/sprint_objective.md contract and MUST agree. Authored by Deliver at decompose/sign-off — NEVER LLM-inferred from prompt text (determinism). select_skills_for_task maps these against skill-catalog `signals` tags to mount extra OPTIONAL skills for Dev/Deliver/Research/Reviewer (Acceptance is EXCLUDED — §2.5). OPTIONAL + additive: absent on every existing stanza (byte-identical); neither the stanza nor planned_subsprints enters the requirement-context sidecar → acceptance_input_hash is unaffected. Dormant until skills carry `signals` tags + Deliver authors task_signals (Track 1 Phase 1-c).
